title: Cap Table Strategy Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger cap table strategy foundations judgment so capital / fundraising work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Cap Table Strategy Foundations is a leverage point inside capital / fundraising. It supports the broader goal of fundraising, capital allocation, investor relations, and financial strategy.
coreConcepts: Cap Table Strategy Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good cap table strategy foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Cap Table Strategy Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
